testcases.input: Customer table: +-------------+-------------+ | customer_id | product_key | +-------------+-------------+ | 1 | 5 | | 2 | 6 | | 3 | 5 | | 3 | 6 | | 1 | 6 | +-------------+-------------+ Product table: +-------------+ | product_key | +-------------+ | 5 | | 6 | +-------------+ Output: +-------------+ | customer_id | +-------------+ | 1 | | 3 | +-------------+ Explanation: The customers who bought all the products (5 and 6) are customers with IDs 1 and 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: +-------------+ | customer_id | +-------------+ | 1 | | 3 | +-------------+ Explanation: The customers who bought all the products (5 and 6) are customers with IDs 1 and 3.
